Operation 'getIssue' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description mentions comments and attachments but lacks clarity about what specific issue properties are returned. Added context about required parameters, return type (Issue object), and use case to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns details of a specific issue including comments and attachments
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific issue within a project, including the issue's properties, associated comments, and attachments. Requires the project ID and issue ID as path parameters. Returns a complete Issue object with all metadata and related data. Useful for viewing full issue context and discussion history.
data.reasoning: The current description mentions comments and attachments but lacks clarity about what specific issue properties are returned. Added context about required parameters, return type (Issue object), and use case to improve AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createComment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added details about required parameters, request schema reference, return value (Comment object), and side effects (notifications) to help AI agents understand the full scope of this operation and its consequences.

data.current_summary: Create a comment on an issue
data.current_description: Adds a new comment to an existing issue
data.description_suggestion: Adds a new comment to an existing issue within a project. Requires the project ID and issue ID as path parameters, and a comment body in the request. The CreateCommentRequest schema specifies the required fields. Returns the newly created Comment object with metadata including creation timestamp and author information. This operation modifies the issue's comment history and may trigger notifications.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added details about required parameters, request schema reference, return value (Comment object), and side effects (notifications) to help AI agents understand the full scope of this operation and its consequences.

message: Operation 'getPriorities' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is too generic ('Get priorities' could apply to many contexts). Description mentions caching but lacks clarity about what is returned and when to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more specific to the domain, and expanded description to explain the return type, caching rationale, and practical use cases for AI agents.

data.current_description: Returns all available priorities and their numeric values. These values can be safely cached locally.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all available priorities for issues across the Sifter instance, including their numeric values and identifiers. Returns a list of Priority objects that can be safely cached locally since priorities are static and rarely change. Use this operation to populate priority selection dropdowns or validate priority values when creating or updating issues.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Get priorities' could apply to many contexts). Description mentions caching but lacks clarity about what is returned and when to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more specific to the domain, and expanded description to explain the return type, caching rationale, and practical use cases for AI agents.
